feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Document and Reporting Compliance
feed.subtitle: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Automate ANAF UIT PDF email transmission.
entry.content:
Dears,

We need your support for implementing an automatic job to transmit the UIT document generated in pdf format from the ANAF platform to SAP Inbox or by email to a specific distribution list.

entry.title: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance for Perú - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to run the SAP DRC enabled legal reports for my country. However, the reports are not displaying information and not processing any information the templates. Below, I detail the procedures performed.

1) In the CBC, an organizational structure for data processing has already been created.

2) Activation of the Document and Report Compliance (5XU) scope element has been requested.

3) My user has all the necessary roles for the execution of legal reports.

BR_AP_MANAGER_PE

BR_GL_ACCOUNTANT_PE

BR_ADMINISTRATOR

4) In the app, the reports are displayed.

5) However, in this application it does not allow to run legal reports.

Please support any additional configuration that may be required. ?

that might be required to run SAP DRC legal reports ?

Thanks,

Antony

entry.title: no permissions to create and activate the SSCUI - 105518 “Enable document and report compliance"
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to enable document and report compliance features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system. However, it does not allow me to activate.

I get that I do not have permission. But my user has all the expert and administration roles.

does not allow to create a record.

What role might be missing?
What would be the procedure to execute the permission ?

Thank you very much.

Best regards,

Antony Pantoja

entry.title: SAP DRC for e-invoicing
entry.content: Does SAP DRC require any more access points after getting Peppol registration?

entry.title: Does SAP DRC requires any more access point after getting Peppol registration
entry.content: Does SAP DRC require any more access point after getting Peppol registration

entry.title: eDocument not not relevant"
entry.content:
The report EDOC_COCKPIT only finds hits if the search is for "eDocument not not relevant".

How can make it relevant to find all SD Invoices?

entry.title: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance for Perú - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition DemoStarter
entry.content:
Hello Experts

Currently, the SAP DRC solution is active and the legal reports are working. However , I am unable to create new custom reports in the “Define Statutory Reports” app.

My user has all the required roles.

What could be missing?
Is another configuration missing?

#Sap Document and Reporting Compliance

#SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Best regards,

Antony Pantoja

entry.title: What is the Process for e-invoicing
entry.content: What is the procedure for obtaining a Peppol network ID? Since we already have access to SAP DRC, which includes an access point, is it still necessary to acquire a separate Peppol ID for e-invoicing?

entry.title: DRC eDocument .html file / Tax Payer ID
entry.content:
Hey Community,

we are currently implementing the DRC tool incl. eDocument for Hungary. We need to change the Tax Payer ID field in the .html file. Unfortunately we cannot find the system setting where it can be changed.

 

On company code level I can enter a tax number, but it is passed in the field “Community Vat Number”.

Does anyone have an idea?

Regards Christian

SAP Document and Reporting Compliance 
#eDocument

entry.title: How to Get EWay Bill PDF in SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have implemented EInvoicing and EWay Bill in SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition through EDocument Cockpit. How to take EWay Bill PDF Print in SAP?

Is it available in EDocument Cockpit?

Kindly Help.

Regards,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: SAP DRC can be connected to Multiple backend S/4 systems in same landscape
entry.content:
Hi , 

Can someone guide if SAP DRC can be connected to Multiple backend S/4 systems in same landscape and provide detailed documentation how we can achieve it . 

Thanks,

entry.title: SAP DRC as Access point
entry.content: We are using SAP DRC, which includes an access point. Is it still necessary to acquire Peppol Network?

entry.title: Post tax payable - Vat return Poland - list of invoices included
entry.content:
Dear community,

I would like to ask you if there is a possibility to extract list of all invoices included (e.g. from last fiscal year) in the tax payable postings. Currently for vat return we use app run statutory reports but when you move to the step for report creation and you press new run you are redirected to the old GUI app - Create Advance Return on Sales/Purchase Tax and tax payable is posted via batch session:

The posting is done per profit center and there is no link to related invoices. So do you know if there is any cds or app which stored this kind of information (invoices included in each run/post payable posting).

Thanks,

Kamil

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Localization SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: AIF Namespace /EDCII
entry.content:
Hi all,

after I*ve created an edoc when I mark the edoc in edoc_cockpit an try to display as XML I got this Error: UBL mapping information cannot be determined.
Diagnosis

The mapping for the Cross Industry Invoice (CII) is based on the UBL
mapping for PEPPOL. This UBL mapping could not be determined.

while Debugging I saw in structure EDOC_CII_MAPPING_SOURCE which I coming from using Tocde "/N/AIF/CUST then Namesapce /EDCII then from the SAP Data Structure Field that the UBL_REQ_TARGET_STRUCTRE_NAME and UBL_REQ_TARGET_FIELD_NAME are empty.

from where come the value of both Fields!

Any Idee what Structure I nee to add for Namesapce /EDCII or this should be allready filled out from Standard?

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Live Tax E-Reporting in SAP DRC - Digital Reporting Requirement in Europe - ViDA Peppol
entry.content:
Dear all,

I would like to know if e-reporting functionalities linked to Peppol invoicing and tax reporting are already integrated with SAP DRC (For Belgium and France) ? Deadline seems to be 2028... "  Any information or Roadmap about This would be helpfull...

From January 2028, Belgium is aiming for a 5-corner Peppol-model. As well as e-invoicing, this will include near-live e-reporting of transaction data (based on e-invoices) to replace the annual customer listing report. The aim is to help reduce the VAT Gap, the difference between forecast and actually collected tax. The latest Belgian VAT Gap is estimated by the EU to be €4.8bn per annum."

entry.title: Getting error while trying to create HTML for edocument
entry.content:
1) Proxy error SOAP:1008 SRT: Couldn't create Object: ("ICF Error: when creating HTTP client object by Config for UR L "https://pe @5F\QNo long text exists@@

2) @5C\QError@ Proxy error questTest": OA2C_MISSING_AUTHORIZATION"): @5F\QNo long text exists@@

entry.title: Connection tab keeps loading and fails "logon.faces"
entry.content:
I'm trying to open CMC on port 6400, and everything works as expected. However, when I try to open the "Connection" tab, it keeps loading and eventually fails. I've read that some people suggest opening port 6405 to fix this issue, but I’d like to get your feedback first.

Thanks,

entry.title: ACR - MX LOCALIZATION - Missing Reporting Activities ID or Report Activity ID
entry.content:
Hi community 

We are trying to implement ACR for MX Localization

After BC set activation we notice there is missing "activity ID" from the FIORI side (even thought exist on the maintenance table SRFVC_RPG_ENT)

Therefore, We cannot generate the reports

How can input the missing entries?

If I choose "add" from the FIORI side it ask for a Z Custom Object, so I do not think is the right solution

Thanks in advance for your help

entry.title: IFRS 18 - Presentation and Disclosure in Financial Statements - guidance
entry.content:
Hi,

Has anyone come across any SAP Notes, tips, best practices, setup guidance, or brainstorming related to IFRS 18?

thanks,
Tomi

entry.title: Field ID is empty in Tax Category of TaxSubtotal
entry.content:
Hi,

Kindly how could I maintain Field ID in  Tax Category of TaxSubtotal? Is this in /n/AIF/VMAP -> Define Value Mapping? If yes, what could I maintain?

BR
